title: isolepis subsquarrosa
intro: Isolepis subsquarrosa, also known as the Square-headed Sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to Australia. The Square-headed Sedge has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema. Isolepis subsquarrosa is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
